key.name: update-refresh
key.description: Minutes to wait before automatically re-checking for updates.

key.name: show-firmware
key.description: Show firmware updates provided by fwupdmgr (requires fwupdmgr and jq).

key.name: show-window-on-click
key.description: When true, left-click opens the updates list window instead of the popup menu.

key.name: refresh-when-no-updates
key.summary: Refresh on click when no updates
key.description: When show-window-on-click is enabled and there are no updates, left-click triggers a refresh instead of opening an empty window.

key.name: command-update-show
key.summary: Show "Check for new updates" menu entry

key.name: command-upgrade
key.description: Shell command executed when the user triggers a package upgrade from the menu.

key.name: different-levels
key.summary: Use different icons for update count levels

key.name: level-1
key.description: Show the "low" icon when pending updates count is below this value.

key.name: level-2
key.description: Show the "medium" icon when pending updates count is below this value (and above level-1). Show "high" above this value.
